items.title: With the 44th pick of the NBA Draft the Spurs select Maliq Brown!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
With the 44th pick of the NBA Draft the Spurs select Maliq Brown!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: Spurs use the 44th overall pick to select 6-9 Duke-alumnus Maliq Brown, 22.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs use the 44th overall pick to select 6-9 Duke-alumnus Maliq Brown, 22. 

Brown, who also played at Syracuse, was the ACC's Defensive Player of the Year and Sixth Man of the Year.

items.title: San Antonio had a lot of strengths defensively, but their quest to never foul meant that they ranked 28th in opponent turnover percentage. They have now used second round picks on Ja'Kobi Gillespie (2.1 steals) and now Maliq Brown (1.8 steals)
items.author: Law Murray 📘
